title: Financial Status Tracking Term and Condition
description: Financial Status Tracking Terms and Conditions are the set of rules, obligations, and provisions that govern the use of a financial status tracking service, specifying how financial information will be monitored, recorded, reported, and used, along with the responsibilities of the service provider and the client, limitations of the service, confidentiality requirements, compliance with regulations, and procedures for notifications and termination

x-relationships.description: Inherits from Financial Status Tracking Product Feature
